decisions.subject: Stale baseline anchor replacement
decisions.decision: Replace all authority anchors from 10cad07f to 48e2caa7 across 9 documents
decisions.rationale: 15 commits and 5 merged PRs (#213-217) separate the former anchor from current main. Authority documents must reflect current code and CI truth.
decisions.evidence: git log --oneline 10cad07f..48e2caa7 shows 15 commits; git rev-parse origin/main = 48e2caa7
alternatives_rejected: Keep 10cad07f and add addendum (rejected: stale anchor creates contradictory instructions)
Rebase to PR #216 merge ee240ddc (rejected: PR #217 is the latest)
decisions.limitations: Historical references to 10cad07f are preserved where labeled as historical context

decisions.subject: Authentication and RBAC capability elevation
decisions.decision: Elevate Authentication and Tenancy/RBAC from SUPPORTED to CERTIFIED FOR RECORDED SCOPE
decisions.rationale: PR #214 introduced identity-claim validation, tenant-scoped route authorization, and a dedicated certification CI lane that passes in CI.
decisions.evidence: PR #214 merge a93d2513; portal/tests/test_auth_tenant_rbac_certification.py exists; ci.yml defines auth-tenant-rbac-certification lane
alternatives_rejected: Keep as SUPPORTED (rejected: certification evidence exists)
Elevate to production-certified (rejected: no production certification exists)
decisions.limitations: Refresh edge cases untested; session revocation not implemented; no token rotation; no logout invalidation; no concurrent session policy

decisions.subject: Audit and correlation capability elevation
decisions.decision: Elevate Audit/evidence from SUPPORTED to CERTIFIED FOR RECORDED SCOPE; add Correlation row as CERTIFIED FOR RECORDED SCOPE
decisions.rationale: PR #215 introduced immutable audit envelopes with correlation context and a dedicated certification CI lane.
decisions.evidence: PR #215 merge a0d9900b; portal/auth/audit_envelope.py and portal/auth/correlation.py exist; ci.yml defines audit-correlation-non-http-certification lane
alternatives_rejected: Keep audit as SUPPORTED only (rejected: certification evidence exists)
Add as compliance-certified (rejected: no compliance certification exists)
decisions.limitations: Multiple event logs still exist; unified audit schema pending; incomplete server-level exception correlation

decisions.subject: WebSocket transport hardening addition
decisions.decision: Add WebSocket transport row as CERTIFIED FOR RECORDED SCOPE
decisions.rationale: PR #217 introduced WebSocket capacity, rate, timeout, lifetime, and payload controls with a dedicated certification CI lane.
decisions.evidence: PR #217 merge 48e2caa7; portal/auth/ws_hardening.py exists; ci.yml defines http-correlation-ws-hardening-certification lane
alternatives_rejected: Add as EXPERIMENTAL (rejected: certification evidence exists)
Claim distributed enforcement (rejected: enforcement is process-local only)
decisions.limitations: Process-local enforcement; deprecated query-token support; no distributed enforcement

decisions.subject: Operations Floor status correction
decisions.decision: Change Operations Floor from FROZEN LOCALLY to SUPPORTED
decisions.rationale: Operations Floor was restored on main through PR #208 (commit aa0c9a74). The file web/src/pages/OperationsFloor.tsx exists on origin/main. The referenced commit 0aaffdc is not resolvable in the current repository object database or authoritative refs.
decisions.evidence: git log --oneline origin/main -- web/src/pages/OperationsFloor.tsx shows aa0c9a74; git cat-file -e origin/main:web/src/pages/OperationsFloor.tsx succeeds; commit 0aaffdc not found in git log --all or git cat-file -e
alternatives_rejected: Keep as FROZEN LOCALLY (rejected: file is on main)
Claim all visual checkpoints recovered (rejected: only the restored baseline is on main; unrelated lost visual commits remain non-authoritative)
decisions.limitations: No behavior tests; the restored baseline is the only authoritative version; any unrelated lost local visual commit remains non-authoritative

decisions.subject: Mission Control boundary preservation
decisions.decision: Preserve all Mission Control boundary constraints unchanged; add security certification note
decisions.rationale: PR #214-217 security certifications enforce identity, tenant, audit, and transport controls at code level but do NOT alter the Mission Control execution boundary.
decisions.evidence: portal/services/mission_control_command_guard.py still returns COMMAND_EXECUTION_NOT_ENABLED; no runner execution code added in PR #214-217
alternatives_rejected: Grant Mission Control execution authority (rejected: shared execution protocol not yet defined)
Remove convergence rule (rejected: still required for Increment Two B and G4.8)
decisions.limitations: Shared execution protocol still required before live execution; refusal-only boundary unchanged

decisions.subject: Open PR disposition update
decisions.decision: Update all 10 open PR dispositions with current behind/ahead counts and governed recommendations; no PR state changes
decisions.rationale: All PRs are 39-132 commits behind current main. Previous dispositions were based on old main. Several PRs are now superseded by merged security certifications.
decisions.evidence: git rev-list --count <head>..origin/main for each PR; gh pr list --state open confirms 10 open PRs
alternatives_rejected: Recommend merging MERGEABLE PRs (rejected: MERGEABLE does not imply merge readiness)
Post PR comments (rejected: no PR state changes authorized)
decisions.limitations: Recommendations are governance proposals only; no PR state changes authorized

decisions.subject: Certification terminology boundary
decisions.decision: Use CERTIFIED FOR RECORDED SCOPE consistently; never use production-certified or compliance-certified
decisions.rationale: Security certifications cover specific increment test suites passing in CI. They do not constitute production, HIPAA, SOC 2, or PCI-DSS certification.
decisions.evidence: README states NOT production-certified; no compliance certification exists in repository
alternatives_rejected: Use CERTIFIED without qualifier (rejected: implies broader certification)
Use COMPLIANCE-CERTIFIED (rejected: no compliance audit exists)
decisions.limitations: Recorded limitations preserved: process-local WebSocket, deprecated query-token, incomplete server-level exception correlation, no distributed enforcement

decisions.subject: Scope freeze at 14 files
decisions.decision: Freeze changed-file scope at exactly 14 files: 9 updates + 5 creates
decisions.rationale: Scope was reviewed and conditionally approved. No fifteenth file is authorized. The scope document itself (file 10) is included in the count.
decisions.evidence: Approved scope in increment-2-scope-and-discrepancy-matrix.md; git status --porcelain=v1 confirms only docs/ files
alternatives_rejected: Add separate convergence evidence report (rejected: would expand scope to 15 files)
Exclude scope document from count (rejected: it is a changed file)
decisions.limitations: No additional files may be added without re-approval
